trade.summary: Close trading partners with ongoing post-Brexit US-UK trade deal negotiations. Financial services and pharmaceuticals dominate.
disputes: Steel and aluminium tariff legacy issues

diplomatic.summary: Deepest diplomatic partnership among US allies. Intelligence sharing (Five Eyes), coordinated foreign policy on Russia, Iran, and China.

military.summary: Cornerstone NATO allies with extensive interoperability. Shared nuclear deterrence arrangements. Joint operations in multiple theatres.

financial.summary: Deep financial integration. London and New York serve as twin hubs of global finance. Large mutual FDI stocks.

energy.summary: US LNG a key component of UK energy security post-Russia sanctions. Cooperation on North Sea and Atlantic energy projects.

scientific.summary: Among the most productive bilateral research partnerships globally. Joint programmes in AI, quantum computing, and life sciences.
